MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ALBERT RAINER AND RA LIMITED'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Special Interrogoatories (Set One) Req. For Production Of Documents (Set One); For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Albert Rainer's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted in part and denied in part. The motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is denied as responses have been served. The motion to compel as to the form interrogatories and request for production of documents is moot as responses have been served. The motion to compel responses to special interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $880 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
